competitors.name: The White Willow
competitors.positioning: The White Willow is a luxury brand offering sophisticated scents and elegant packaging, emphasizing the use of the finest ingredients and intricate designs. Their candles are a testament to craftsmanship and quality, ensuring a premium and unadulterated burning experience.

competitors.name: Smiisenses
competitors.positioning: Smiisenses offers premium scented soy candles with a focus on elegant packaging and refined fragrance experiences. Their products are suitable for modern home decor and gifting, with a range of options to cater to different tastes and preferences.
competitors.strengths: Elegant packaging and refined fragrance experiences
competitors.target_audience: Individuals seeking premium home decor and gifting options

competitors.name: Roci India
competitors.positioning: Roci India blends French perfumery with Indian aesthetics, delivering luxury soy candles with elegant scent profiles and premium finishes. Their products are ideal for luxury gifting, bedroom or vanity styling, and refined fragrance lovers.
competitors.strengths: Unique blend of French and Indian aesthetics

competitors.name: Sorcish
competitors.positioning: Sorcish offers luxury aesthetic soy wax candles for home decor and gifting, with a focus on premium look, fragrance experience, and decorative elegance. Their products are suitable for buyers looking for a refined and high-quality candle experience.
competitors.strengths: Luxury aesthetic and high-quality candle experience
competitors.target_audience: Individuals seeking premium home decor and gifting options

competitors.name: JiViSa
competitors.positioning: JiViSa consistently ranks among the most trusted Indian candle brands, offering natural soy wax candles that burn cleanly with minimal soot and a smooth, balanced scent. Their products are ideal for those seeking a clean burn and fragrance quality.
competitors.strengths: Natural soy wax and clean burn
competitors.target_audience: Individuals seeking high-quality and natural candle options

recommended_skus.name: Midnight Bloom
recommended_skus.description: A hand-poured soy wax candle with a floral scent profile and elegant packaging

recommended_skus.name: Sandalwood Serenity
recommended_skus.description: A luxury soy wax candle with a soothing sandalwood fragrance and premium finish

packaging_trends: Customizable and personalized packaging options for gifting
seasonal_opportunities: Summer and monsoon season wellness and relaxation

pricing_analysis.launch_strategy: Enter the market with a competitive pricing strategy, focusing on the premium segment with a hero product priced at ₹4,499. Utilize influencer marketing and targeted advertising to create buzz around the brand and drive sales.
pricing_analysis.discount_recommendation: Offer a limited-time 15% discount at launch to incentivize first-time customers and encourage word-of-mouth marketing.

brand_direction.copy_style: Write in a concise and sophisticated tone, focusing on the premium quality and craftsmanship of Lumière's handcrafted soy candles. Emphasize the unique scent profiles and the attention to detail in the luxury packaging, while maintaining a sense of modernity and simplicity.
key_differentiators: Handcrafted soy candles with unique scent profiles
Luxury packaging with a focus on minimalist design
Premium quality and attention to detail in every product
brand_direction.brand_promise: Elevate your space with the warmth and sophistication of Lumière's premium handcrafted soy candles
what_to_avoid: Using overly elaborate or flashy language
Focusing too much on price rather than quality and craftsmanship
Incorporating cluttered or busy design elements
